form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 4.5 lengths over 600m at this track in a handy (34.73), beating Magic Scotch. Will find this a bit tougher, hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 4.5 lengths over 600m at this track in a handy (34.73), beating Magic Scotch. Will find this a bit tougher, hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a lightning 35.03 over 600m finishing third at Bendigo. Expected to go close with a repeat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at this track latest but prior to that clocked a lightning 35.03 over 600m finishing third at Bendigo. Expected to go close with a repeat.

form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 595m at Sandown by 5 lengths in a Grade 4/5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 595m at Sandown by 5 lengths in a Grade 4/5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Scored by a neck last time (34.98) in a Grade 4/5 over 600m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 12 starts. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Scored by a neck last time (34.98) in a Grade 4/5 over 600m at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 12 starts. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 4th over 520m at Geelong beaten 8 lengths (30.68) behind Tripped Out in a Special conditions H on April 10. Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 520m at Geelong. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.
